diagnosis: The player spawned on a solid floor at the bottom of a massive level (200+ tiles wide, 24 tiles tall) but never moved horizontally — the trace shows 6.7 seconds stationary at the spawn X coordinate. The level is dominated by a solid bedrock floor and repetitive stair-step 'X' structures with no elevation changes, vertical traversal mechanics, or enemy variety. The exit sits far to the right on the same baseline, making this a pure horizontal hold-right walk with zero meaningful interaction, which matches the player's 'needs more interesting enemies' comment and the 3/5 rating despite 0 deaths/falls.
